course_expected_weights._note: Shinnecock Hills: Par-70, ~7445y, links-style major. USGA setup — firm, fast, penal rough. APP is the primary differentiator (160-190y approach distances, severe penalty for missing greens). ARG elevated due to tight lies, runoffs, and wind. PUTT moderate (poa annua/fescue mix, variable speeds under wind). OTT neutral — accuracy trumps distance on narrow corridors. Knowledge-based estimate: no Shinnecock entry in COURSE_DNA_LIBRARY.

field_coverage.warning: COVERAGE GAP: BBI rankings cover only 49/156 (31.4%) of the live U.S. Open field. 107 live players including McIlroy, Scheffler, Schauffele, Rahm, Aberg, DeChambeau, Thomas, Spieth, Matsuyama, Bradley, Niemann, Fowler had NO pre-tournament BBI prediction. Their 'win shift' values are spurious — they read as +N pp surges from 0%, but the 0% reflects MISSING DATA, not a real model prediction. Phase 1 (Apollo) for US_Open needs a re-run with the full official 156-player USGA field. Until then, the valid PERSEPHONE comparisons are the 49 covered players (top names: Fleetwood, Fitzpatrick, Burns, Rose, Morikawa, Clark, Koepka).
